variants: Ignacio Larrondo holds the distinguished Astral Pawnbroker Endorsement, highlighting his expertise in the field. His research has been disseminated through the Mossgate Manuscripts, where he presents his findings with clarity and depth. Under the mentorship of Gloria Espinosa, Ignacio honed his skills and developed innovative ideas. In his spare time, he contributes to literacy efforts as the Ambassador of the Pinecone Literacy League. Supported by the Peregrine Advance Guild, his studies continue to receive the necessary funding to advance his academic pursuits.
